zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD维持窄幅震荡，价格稳定在0.244附近，日内波动有限，显示多空双方暂时均衡。价格略高于20日均线，说明短线资金仍偏向谨慎做多，整体结构维持弱势反弹格局。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持在零轴上方，柱体保持轻微正值，代表短周期动能尚未完全衰减。不过RSI数据暂缺，市场缺乏明确超买或超卖参考，因此后续方向仍需成交量进一步确认。

支撑位可关注0.2430区域，该位置接近20日均线，若跌破可能重新测试0.240整数关口。上方阻力位位于0.2455至0.2470区间，若放量突破，短线有机会延续反弹并挑战更高压力区域。

交易策略方面，激进交易者可依托0.243附近轻仓低吸，目标关注0.246上方；稳健投资者则建议等待有效突破阻力后再顺势跟进。当前波动率偏低，应严格控制仓位并设置止损。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is currently trading in a very tight consolidation near 0.244, showing minimal volatility and a slight upward bias. The price remains marginally above the 20-day SMA at 0.2429, suggesting short-term bullish pressure is intact. However, the narrow 24h range indicates market indecision rather than strong directional conviction. Overall structure leans neutral-to-slightly bullish, with momentum dependent on a breakout from this compressed range, with volatility expected to remain compressed near term.

Momentum signals are modestly constructive. MACD shows a small positive value at 0.0001178, indicating early bullish momentum, though confirmation is limited without a clear signal line reading. RSI is unavailable, reducing overbought/oversold context. Price holding above the SMA(20) reinforces a mild bullish tilt, but the weak MACD strength suggests this is more consolidation than trend expansion at this stage slightly.

Immediate support sits at the SMA(20) near 0.2429, which has been acting as a short-term pivot. A deeper support zone lies at the recent low around 0.2439, though this is very close to current price, reflecting compression. Resistance is located at 0.2442 followed by a psychological extension near 0.2450. A decisive break above resistance could open path toward short-term continuation.

Trading conditions favor short-term range strategies until a breakout confirms direction. Scalpers may look to buy near SMA support with tight risk controls below 0.2429, while breakout traders should wait for a clean move above 0.2442 with volume confirmation. Given the low volatility, risk-reward setups remain constrained, so position sizing should stay conservative and adaptive to sudden expansion in momentum.
